title: Sprint 1: Foundation
author: Alex
summary: Set up Next.js 14 project structure, configured Tailwind CSS with Swiss International Style system, and established CI/CD pipeline on Vercel.

title: Sprint 2: Core Data Models
author: Sarah
summary: Defined database schemas for Users and Projects. Implemented initial API endpoints for data retrieval. Integrated mock data for frontend development.

title: Alpha Release Notes
author: Team
summary: Successfully deployed the Alpha version to the staging environment. Key features include user login and basic dashboard visualization.
